title: palisota lagopus
intro: Palisota lagopus, also known as the elephant ear or elephant ear vine, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Palisota lagopus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Palisota lagopus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional African medicine.
